query: We just spent this whole session refactoring the auth flow and the agents migrated the database schema while I was away. Catch me up on what got done and what needs my input.
A bunch of work landed on the feature branch while I was out at lunch — several commits from the agents. Where are we now? Give me the plain-English version, I don't read the code closely.
I've been heads-down on another project all week while agents worked through the API redesign here. Fill me in on what changed and why before I decide next steps.
Ok I'm back. You and the subagents have been going for a couple hours on the data-layer cleanup. Recap what you got done and flag anything that needs a decision from me.
Lots happened since my last check-in — the agents finished the pagination work and hit some bug. Brief me on where things stand.
